case_title: APOYO FINANCIERO INC. VS. MARIANO E RODRIGUEZ REYES

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-29-2023 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO DEC-01-2023 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO INC. IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY VERONICA ROSALES (ASSISTANT MANAGER) WHO IS ASSISTED BY CERTIFIED SPANISH-LANGUAGE COURT INTERPRETER SHANNON RAINTREE (#300563). NO PROOF OF SERVICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: PANG LY; CLERK: S. KANE. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
ORDER TO CONTINUE FOR PROOF OF SERVICE: NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF
SC-109 AUTHORIZATION TO APPEAR [VERONICA ROSALES REQUESTING TO APPEAR ON BEHALF OF PLAINTIFF] FILED BY PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO INC.
ORDER TO CONTINUE FOR PROOF OF SERVICE

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. HOWEVER THE TWO REQUESTED COURT CERTIFIED SPANISH INTERPRETERS WERE PRESENT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: PANG LY; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY APOYO FINANCIERO INC. AS TO DEFENDANT RODRIGUEZ REYES, MARIANO E ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-29-2023 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO INC. AS TO DEFENDANT RODRIGUEZ REYES, MARIANO E
